title: postapiauthloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Test POST /api/auth/login with valid email and password to receive 200 OK and a JWT token.

title: postapiauthregisterwithvalidaccesscode
description: Test POST /api/auth/register with valid name, email, password, and accessCode to receive 201 Created and verify engineer registration status.

title: getapiauthmewithvalidtoken
description: Test GET /api/auth/me with valid Authorization Bearer token to receive 200 OK and current user profile.

title: postapigroupswithvalidpayloadandauthorizedtoken
description: Test POST /api/groups with valid group data and Authorization Bearer token to receive 201 Created with new group id.

title: getapigroupswithauthorizedtoken
description: Test GET /api/groups with valid Authorization Bearer token to receive 200 OK and list of groups including newly created group.

title: putapigroupsidwithvalididandpayload
description: Test PUT /api/groups/{id} with valid group id, updated fields, and Authorization Bearer token to receive 200 OK with updated group details.

title: postapissessionswithvalidpayloadandauthorizedtoken
description: Test POST /api/sessions with valid session payload and Authorization Bearer token to receive 201 Created with session id.

title: putapissessionsidattendancewithvalidpayloadandauthorizedtoken
description: Test PUT /api/sessions/{id}/attendance with valid attendance payload and Authorization Bearer token to receive 200 OK confirming attendance records stored.

title: getapiengineerswithadminauthorization
description: Test GET /api/engineers with Authorization Bearer token containing Admin claim to receive 200 OK and list of engineers.

title: putapipendingidapprovewithadminauthorization
description: Test PUT /api/pending/{id}/approve with valid pending engineer id and Admin Authorization Bearer token to receive 200 OK confirming approval.
